data.title: Trab Health Launches Luminara, A Holistic Women's Wellness Supplement For The Demands Of Daily Life
data.description: Trab Health has introduced a new plant-based supplement called Luminara, containing Clavo Huasca, designed to combat the effects of modern life and aging on stamina and overall health. The product was launched in COVINA, Calif. on March 30, 2026. Luminara aims to improve well-being and vitality through its carefully crafted formula. This supplement targets individuals seeking to boost their stamina and overall health in the face of the challenges posed by modern lifestyles.

data.title: Spanish tech company Lleida.net Obtains New Brazilian Patent
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Madrid, the National Institute of Industrial Property in Brazil awarded a patent to Lleida.net (BME:LLN) (EPA:ALLLN) for their electronic mail receipt recording and certification method. This marks the second patent granted to the company in Brazil.

data.title: BTC price set to reach $72,000 by April with short-term target at $69,500 and medium-term forecast at $72,000-$75,000. Bullish breakout at $69,528.
data.description: Summary of Bitcoin Price Predictions: The short-term target for the next week is set at $69,500, while the medium-term forecast for the upcoming month ranges between $72,000 and $75,000. The bullish breakout level to watch is $69,528. It is essential to note that critical support for Bitcoin's price was not mentioned in the information available.

data.title: Phreesia, Progress Software And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Monday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up this morning on Monday, with investor attention likely to be on specific stocks. Americas Gold and Silver Corp. (NYSE: USAS) is anticipated to announce earnings of 1 cent per share on $33.23 million in revenue for the quarter. The company's shares increased by 3.6% to $5.50 at Friday's close. ARKO Petroleum Corp. (NASDAQ: APC) is also on analysts' radar, with expectations for quarterly earnings to reach 13 cents per share. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
